scope.target: Draft requirements for implementation skill naming and domain ubiquitous language management.
scope.dependency_radius: Requirement documents only; future workflow will implement skill and structure changes.
constraints: Use requirement-author and stop at requirement quality.
Do not rename skills in this pass.
Do not implement technical glossary in this pass.
Do not update agents unless repository identity is unclear.

inputs.architecture_target: Clear requirements for future dev-workflow execution.
user_constraints: Focus domain ubiquitous language first; defer technical glossary.
Explain decisions needed and recommended approach.
Evaluate whether repo core purpose is clear enough to avoid agents updates.

validation: rg requirement title and open decision checks.
deferred_items: Domain language template and standards implementation.

results.summary: Created requirement documents that capture the skill naming/test authoring and domain ubiquitous language needs, including required user decisions and recommended approaches.
tests_run: rg requirement title and open decision checks
